---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for ChainSettle
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? What use case does it address?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this feature working.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Component
- [ ] Auth (nonce / JWT)
- [ ] Shipments
- [ ] Milestones
- [ ] Events (Stellar poller)
- [ ] Notifications
- [ ] Health
- [ ] Prisma / Database schema
- [ ] Stellar RPC / StellarService
- [ ] Common (guards, filters, interceptors)
- [ ] New module
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Stellar / Soroban Context
If this feature involves on-chain interaction, describe the relevant contract events, ledger data, or Soroban RPC calls.

## Implementation Notes
If you have technical ideas about how this could be implemented, please share them here.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.
